title: causal-certificate: A strict-causality certificate for PyTorch sequence models
description: A numeric strict-causality certificate for PyTorch sequence models. Using one forward pass and a sweep of vector-Jacobian products, it verifies that no output at position t depends on an input at position s > t -- catching the silent future-token and batch-statistic leaks that can inflate autoregressive language-modeling results. Genuinely causal operators certify at exactly zero (no threshold tuning); the tool adds a cross-batch mode for batch-statistic leaks and a random-K training-time monitor. Companion software to the case study on 'block-causal is not position-causal' leaks.
